results.rendered_html:
mithuyā adv. = mithu verkehrt, falsch, unrichtig: na kṣatriyaṃ mithuyā dhārayantam  ṚV. 7,104,13 . mithuyā carantam  AV. 4,29,7 . mā devānāṃ mithuyā karma bhāgam 39,9 .
— Vgl. mithyā.
